raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo kas warretu tewi fau-
dseht/ ak Jerusaleme! Jeb kas
warretu tewi noschehloht? Jeb
kas no-ees un watza.hs pehz ta-
waz Labklahfchanag?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu efti manni afstahjuft/
fakka tag KUNGS: Tu efti
atpakkat gabjuft/ tapehz gribbu
es tawu Rohku prete tewi is-
steepť/ un tewi nomaitaht/ es
efmu peekuffis apschehlotess.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un es wehtischu tohs ar
Wehtikli zaur tahs Gemmes
Wahrtin/ un es nolaupifschu
manneem Gaudim tohs Zehr-
nus/ un nomaitafchu tohs/ ta-
pehz ka tee no Jaweem Jetteem
ne atgreeschahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Man tapg twirak Atrait-
u winzu Starpâ/ neka Ju-
ras Similtis. Es weddifchu
pahr to Jaunektu Mahti weenu
Bohstitaju Deenas-Widdin/ es
likfchu winnu peepechi usbrukt
tam Pittfahtam ar Istruhzina-
chanahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta/ kas feptinus Behr-
nus Dsemde/ buhs wahja/ un
isladihs fawn Dwehfeli. Win
nas Saule no-ees/ kad wehl fee-
la Gaifina irraid/ winna taps
Kaunâ/ un par Apfimeekli/ un
winnu Attiffschas nodofschu es
tam Sohbixam winzo Eenaid-
neeku Preefscha/ fakka tas
KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Waj man! manna Mah-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS fazzija:
Tew pehz schim labbi klahtees/
un es afstahwefchu tewi pee ta
Eenaidneeka/ Nelaimitbas Laika/
un Behdu Laika.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Arrig kahda Dfelse itr/
fag to Dfelfi/ un to Warzu no
Seenteta-Pufes warretu fa-
daufht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bek juhfu Padohnu/un
juhfas Mantas nodofschu es
var Laupijumu bes Makkas/ un
to wiffu juhfu Grehku deht/eeffch
wiffahm juhfu Rohbeschahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un es likfchu juhs afseet
ar juhfu Eenaidneekem kahdâ
Semmê/ ko juhs ne pasihstat:
Jo weens ugguns irr eedesti-
nahts manna Bahrsibâ/ tas
pahr juhs dehgs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak KUNGS! en finni
to/ pecminnt mannis/ un pee-
nkle manni/ un atreeb manni
no manneem Balkat-Dsinne-
jeem. Ne jemai mannt nobst/
kad tu tawu Dusnibu (pahe
teem) pagarrina/ tu finni/ ka
es tevis labbad rohyu nee-
wahts.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
